intro_text: The patrol tracks the scent of a large dog along the edge of the Clan's territory.
decline_text: The patrol decides not to pursue such a dangerous creature, especially seeing as it hasn't crossed the border.

success_outcomes.text: The patrol shadows the dog, sending a message back to warn camp. It's an exhausting and stressful day, but by the time night falls, they've confirmed that the dog is leaving the local area, and the patrol has assured c_n's safety.

log.cats_from: cat_from heard about how cat_to and {PRONOUN/cat_to/poss} patrol tracked a large dog on patrol.

success_outcomes.text: The patrol gathers their courage and valiantly tries to lead the dog away. With such a small group of cats, they can only lead it a short distance, but it's better than nothing.

log.cats_from: cat_from heard about how cat_to and {PRONOUN/cat_to/poss} patrol tried to lead a large dog away from the territory.

success_outcomes.text: s_c sets up a careful ambush ahead of the dog, and {PRONOUN/s_c/poss} surprising, darting attack bloodies the dog's flank, dissuading it from heading further into c_n territory.

cat_to ambushed and drove off a huge dog before cat_from's eyes.

success_outcomes.text: s_c selflessly takes the lion's share of the run the patrol leads the dog on, exhausting {PRONOUN/s_c/self} almost to the point of danger but leading the dog far away from c_n borders. {PRONOUN/s_c/poss/CAP} Clanmates support {PRONOUN/s_c/object} on the long walk home once it's all over, their purrs mixing with s_c's exhausted pants.

success_outcomes.text: They decide that no cat is going to be surprised by this predator again. The patrol shadows the dog, sending a message to warn camp. With enough cats to keep watch, rest, track, and send messages back and forth, c_n is kept safe from the wandering dog.

log.cats_from: cat_from heard that cat_to was on the patrol that saved the Clan from a large dog.

success_outcomes.text: The patrol gathers their courage and valiantly drives away the dog. Together, working as one, and with all the strength of StarClan behind them, the patrol harries the dog. By keeping up a series of small skirmishes through the entire day, they drive it all the way off c_n territory.

log.cats_from: cat_from heard that cat_to was on the patrol that bravely drove a large dog off the territory.

success_outcomes.text: s_c has just enough time to yowl out a plan, leading the whole large patrol in a skillful battle maneuver against the dog that protects the cats from the chance of injury. The dog tucks tail and runs for more friendly lands.

intro_text: r_c comes across a small dog.
decline_text: r_c decides not to pursue the dog.

success_outcomes.text: r_c hisses at the dog, warning it off. It skitters back, yapping loudly but headed in the right direction. Maybe {PRONOUN/r_c/subject} should add dog herding to their list of accomplishments?

The animal is far more tenacious than r_c ever expected, and once the fight starts, there's no escaping from it. As r_c's world goes dark, {PRONOUN/r_c/subject} {VERB/r_c/have/has} {PRONOUN/r_c/poss} fangs sunk in the dog's throat. At least {PRONOUN/r_c/subject}'ll take the beast with {PRONOUN/r_c/object}.

intro_text: The patrol comes across a small dog right on the border of c_n territory.
decline_text: p_l decides not to pursue the dog and instead cuts the patrol short to head back to camp and report it.

success_outcomes.text: p_l hisses at the small dog, and the rest of {PRONOUN/p_l/poss} small team back {PRONOUN/p_l/object} up. The dog skitters back, yapping loudly, apparently shocked by the display. The patrol breaks out into yowls and caterwauls until the dog loses its nerve and runs from the c_n border into the distance.

log.cats_from: cat_to and cat_from drove off a small dog on patrol together.

success_outcomes.text: The patrol paces towards the small dog, claws out, fur up, backed up with the courage of their Clanmates. The dog breaks into a barking fit, but that's their opportunity to attack, covering each other as they push the creature away from their territory.

log.cats_from: cat_to and cat_from drove off a small dog on patrol together.

success_outcomes.text: s_c calls out a battle plan, and the cats flow into it, carefully covering each other. They drive the dog backwards until it loses its nerve, tucks tail, and runs from c_n territory, fleeing deep into the wilderness.

intro_text: p_l and {PRONOUN/p_l/poss} patrol pad through the territory, blinking against the sudden gusts of wind, when they hear a sound that makes them all freeze... a chorus of squeaks and yips that sound a bit too close.
decline_text: The patrol decides not to approach the sound, recognizing that it could be dangerous.

success_outcomes.text: p_l thinks {PRONOUN/p_l/subject} {VERB/p_l/know/knows} what to expect as {PRONOUN/p_l/subject} {VERB/p_l/urge/urges} {PRONOUN/p_l/poss} patrol forward towards the noise, yet {PRONOUN/p_l/subject} {VERB/p_l/are/is} shocked to find a pack of wild dogs feasting on an animal big enough to feed c_n for six moons. The cats stare in awe for a moment before r_c orders them to leave; if these animals can take down a beast like that, what's stopping the creatures from killing them, too?

log.cats_from: cat_to questions cat_from's judgment after leading {PRONOUN/cat_from/poss} patrol towards a dog pack.

success_outcomes.text: The three cats stalk forward, fur bristling and hackles raised, ready for a possible fight — but p_l's tail flicks up in sudden amusement. Across the clearing, the alpha mother of the wild dog pack scolds her offspring in swirling squeaks and chirps, her youngling apologetically licking its lips and tucking tail. From their posture, this pup has just failed a hunt, and the cat's hearts prick with the sympathy of fellow carnivores.

fail_outcomes.text: p_l instructs {PRONOUN/p_l/poss} cats forward, nearing the noise rather quickly. The group strides out in front of a wild dog, the creature yipping excitably. Before any of them can react, another one leaps from the right, then the left... They're surrounded, hollers and yips deafening them as they try and fail to escape. A gaggle of cats are no match for hungry canines.

history_text.death: This cat was ambushed by a pack of wild dogs.
